# Step 1 — Strip LLM Markdown Artifacts from ContentNormaliser

> **Milestone**: M1.3 | **Task**: T1.3.4.1.1.1
> **Depends on**: Nothing (existing ContentNormaliser is complete)
> **Parallelizable with**: T1.3.4.1.1.2 (tests), T1.3.4.2.1.1 (navigation)
> **Skills to load**: None required (pure Dart regex work)

Shared context: [E1.3.4 LLM Content Context](../instructions/e1.3.4-llm-content-context.instructions.md)

---

## Task

Add 5 new regex patterns to `_stripMarkdown` in [content_normaliser.dart](../../lib/features/content/services/content_normaliser.dart) so that LLM chat responses (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini) produce clean reading tokens instead of garbled code/table syntax.

**Design decision**: Code blocks and tables are **removed entirely** (not replaced with placeholders). The user is here for the prose.

---

## File to Modify

`lib/features/content/services/content_normaliser.dart`

### Changes to `_stripMarkdown`

Insert these 5 patterns **at the top of the method** (before the existing image/link stripping), in this exact order:

#### 1. Fenced code blocks (with or without language tag)

```dart
// Remove fenced code blocks: ```lang\n...\n``` → removed entirely.
// Must run before inline code stripping to avoid partial backtick matches.
result = result.replaceAll(
  RegExp(r'```[^\n]*\n[\s\S]*?```', multiLine: true),
  '',
);
```

**Why first**: If inline code (`` `code` ``) runs before this, it matches the opening `` ``` `` as an inline span, orphaning the rest.

#### 2. Indented code blocks (4+ spaces after blank line)

```dart
// Remove indented code blocks: blank line followed by 4+ space-indented lines.
result = result.replaceAll(
  RegExp(r'(?<=\n\n)([ \t]{4,}[^\n]+\n?)+', multiLine: true),
  '',
);
```

#### 3. Markdown tables

```dart
// Remove markdown tables: lines starting/ending with pipes, including header separator.
result = result.replaceAll(
  RegExp(r'^\|[^\n]+\|[ \t]*\n(\|[-:\s|]+\|\n)?(\|[^\n]+\|[ \t]*\n?)*', multiLine: true),
  '',
);
```

#### 4. Footnote definitions and references

```dart
// Remove footnote definitions: [^id]: text at line start.
result = result.replaceAll(
  RegExp(r'^\[\^[^\]]+\]:[ \t]+[^\n]+$', multiLine: true),
  '',
);

// Remove footnote references: [^id] inline.
result = result.replaceAll(RegExp(r'\[\^[^\]]+\]'), '');
```

#### 5. Escape sequences (after all other pattern removal)

This goes **after** existing ordered list markers (near the end, before the final blank line collapse):

```dart
// Remove markdown escape backslashes: \* → *, \[ → [, etc.
result = result.replaceAllMapped(
  RegExp(r'\\([\\`*_\{\}\[\]()#+\-.!|~])'),
  (m) => m.group(1)!,
);
```

### Final method structure (order summary)

1. **NEW**: Fenced code blocks
2. **NEW**: Indented code blocks
3. **NEW**: Tables
4. **NEW**: Footnote definitions + references
5. Images → alt text (existing)
6. Links → text (existing)
7. Reference links → text (existing)
8. Heading markers (existing)
9. Horizontal rules (existing)
10. Blockquotes (existing)
11. Bold+italic (existing)
12. Bold (existing)
13. Italic (existing)
14. Strikethrough (existing)
15. Inline code (existing)
16. Unordered lists (existing)
17. Ordered lists (existing)
18. **NEW**: Escape sequences
19. Collapse blank lines (existing)

---

## Verification

```powershell
dart analyze lib/features/content/services/content_normaliser.dart
flutter test test/features/content/services/content_normaliser_test.dart
```

Both must pass with zero issues. Existing tests must not regress.

---

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Fenced code blocks (` ```lang ... ``` `) are stripped entirely from output
- [ ] Fenced code blocks without language tag (` ``` ... ``` `) are stripped entirely
- [ ] Indented code blocks (4+ leading spaces after a blank line) are stripped entirely
- [ ] Markdown tables (`|---|---|` patterns with pipe-delimited rows) are stripped entirely
- [ ] Escape sequences (`\*`, `\[`, `\]`) have backslash removed, character preserved
- [ ] Footnote markers (`[^1]`) and definitions (`[^1]: text`) are stripped
- [ ] Existing markdown stripping (headings, bold, italic, links, lists, blockquotes) unchanged
- [ ] All 25 existing content_normaliser_test.dart tests still pass
- [ ] `dart analyze` reports zero issues
- [ ] No files outside `lib/features/content/services/content_normaliser.dart` are modified

## Refusal Clause

You may refuse this task if:
- The existing `_stripMarkdown` method signature has changed from what's documented in the shared context
- The regex ordering creates an ambiguity you cannot resolve — list the ambiguity instead
